narrative:
Precinct Zanesville 1-B (precinct in Muskingum County) has 958 registered voters, with 68.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.8%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.7 percentage points.
